creator: will@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

You need to install the XFree86-aoutlibs port; unfortunately, I don't know 
of a way to add it to the port since the current bsd.port.mk only checks 
for ELF libraries. Perhaps this should be fixed in bsd.port.mk? Or am I 
missing a totally different solution here?
